Records.description: Two-loop 4-point non-planar topology with one massive internal propagator ($m_W$) and one massive on-shell external leg $p_4^2=m_t^2$; 35 master integrals. Called ST2 in the paper. Contributes to color-suppressed NNLO QCD corrections to single top-quark production (new result first computed in this thesis). Canonical basis computed with CANONICA in about 20 minutes in variables $x=s/m_W^2$, $y=t/m_W^2$, $z=m_t^2/m_W^2$ with a 14-letter alphabet.
Records.familyName: 2-loop 4-point non-planar double box with W-mass propagator and massive top leg (single-top topology 2) / 2-loop 4-point double box with W-mass propagator and massive top leg (single-top topology 1)

Records.description: Two-loop 4-point planar topology with one massive internal propagator (m_W) and one massive on-shell external leg p4^2=m_t^2; 31 master integrals. Called ST1 in the paper. Contributes to color-suppressed NNLO QCD corrections to single top-quark production (new result first computed in this thesis). Canonical basis computed with CANONICA in about 12 minutes in variables x=s/mW^2, y=t/mW^2, z=mt^2/mW^2 with an 11-letter alphabet.
Records.familyName: 2-loop 4-point double box with W-mass propagator and massive top leg (single-top topology 1)
